serviceProviderName.description: Name of the service provider. Usually a partner, or a fabric service provider.
serviceProviderName.name: serviceProviderName

retrieveUsedVlanIDs.description: Retrieve the VLAN IDs that are already in use at a specific POP. This API is only applicable for reseller accounts with private POPs.
retrieveUsedVlanIDs.name: retrieveUsedVlanIDs
